mapper.select: SELECT `l`.`id` AS `loanId`, `b`.`title` AS `bookTitle`, DATE_FORMAT(`l`.`loan_date`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일') AS `loanDate`, DATE_FORMAT(`l`.`due_date`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일') AS `dueDate`, DATE_FORMAT(`l`.`return_date`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일') AS `returnDate`, `l`.`status` AS `status` FROM `dodamdodam`.`loans` AS `l` JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` AS `bc` ON `l`.`copy_id` = `bc`.`id` JOIN `dodamdodam`.`books` AS `b` ON `bc`.`book_id` = `b`.`id` WHERE `l`.`user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `l`.`loan_date` DESC

SELECT `ea`.`id` AS `applicationId`, `e`.`title` AS `eventTitle`, DATE_FORMAT(`e`.`event_start_at`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일 %H:%i') AS `eventStartAt`, DATE_FORMAT(`e`.`event_end_at`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일 %H:%i') AS `eventEndAt`, `ea`.`status` AS `status` FROM `dodamdodam`.`event_applications` AS `ea` JOIN `dodamdodam`.`events` AS `e` ON `ea`.`event_id` = `e`.`id` WHERE `ea`.`user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `ea`.`created_at` DESC
